character.name: Female mage. Deep indigo blue
character.prompt: Female mage. Deep indigo blue fitted crop top and dark layered skirt with leather belt and small pouches. Honey-blonde hair pulled back in a low bun at the nape. Glowing warm amber-gold arcane orb held in one palm at chest height. Slender build, heroic 7-head proportion. Subtle gold filigree edge detail on clothing. Crisp pixel art style, single-color dark outline, no ground shadow.
